title: Best Local Agents - Jun 2026
summary: A megathread that is overdue! Let's discuss and debate on what the best local agents available today are Prologue First a note on terminology: While most regular users are going to have a general sense of what these are, I think its worth a brief pause to preempt turbulence in the discussion. Agent : There is no standard/universally agreed upon term that I can find - and rightly so. Its hard to tell if this is a hypecycle buzzword or a new primitive. I think its important to first relate to stuf
